assignments.name: BPS_Contract_generated_offline_Not_supported_by_Q2C
assignments.label: BPS Contract generated offline (Not supported by Q2C)

value.stringValue: Contract Generated Offline (Not supported by Q2C)

assignments.name: BPS_Feature_Update_Created_Invoice_Amount
assignments.label: BPS - Feature Update Created Invoice Amount

assignments.name: BPS_Sent_to_billing_manually_rep_or_system_issue
assignments.label: BPS - Sent to billing manually (rep or system issue)

value.stringValue: Sent to Billing Manually (Rep or system issue)

rightValue.stringValue: Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : Admetricks SpA

rules.name: Contract_generated_offline_Not_supported_by_Q2C
rules.label: Contract generated offline (Not supported by Q2C)

rules.name: Sent_to_billing_manually_rep_or_system_issue
rules.label: Sent to billing manually (rep or system issue)

decisions.description: MQ-2320- if the customer selct the Admetricks product and not from chile the certificate ID will be added automatically
decisions.name: Certifde
decisions.label: Certificate ID for Admetricks

decisions.name: decsion_Rule_SC_Status_Changed_to_Cancelled_and_Valid_Until_not_empty
decisions.label: *Rule (SC)* - Status Changed to Cancelled and Valid Until not empty

rules.name: outcome_True_Status_Changed_to_Cancelled_and_Valid_Until_not_empty
rules.label: True (Status Changed to Cancelled and Valid Until not empty)

decisions.description:
MQ-2318 - if the user click on the Generate_Contract_in_Word__c checkbox the green lane change to false
if the user click on the green lane = true it changes Generate_Contract_in_Word__c to false
decisions.name: Green_lane_word_contract
decisions.label: Green lane word contract

decisions.name: Indication_on_account_if_they_re_on_new_old_catalog
decisions.label: Indication on account if they're on new\old catalog

rightValue.stringValue: No - replacing products with new catalog products

decisions.name: Is_start_and_end_date_the_same
decisions.label: Is start and end date the same

rules.name: Outcome_1_of_Is_there_a_payment_change
rules.label: Outcome 1 of Is there a payment change

decisions.description: MQ-1833 - if there's a billing account we pull data from the billing account
decisions.name: Is_there_billing_account
decisions.label: Is there billing account

decisions.description: MQ-2495 - override when there is no product compbility in the quote
decisions.name: Missing_Product_Compatibility
decisions.label: Missing Product Compatibility

decisions.description: Update payment
decisions.name: Newslever_Monthly_Evergreen
decisions.label: Newslever Monthly Evergreen

decisions.description: MQ-2066 - check if the soulation type is no touch and perform updates MQ-2507 - add trial no touch
decisions.name: No_touch
decisions.label: No touch

decisions.description: check if the payment amount in the parent billing account is other
decisions.name: parent_billing_account_payment_method
decisions.label: parent billing account payment method

decisions.description: MQ-2109 - when there is change in the payment method we will put the end date
decisions.name: Payment_Method_change
decisions.label: Payment Method change

decisions.description: When 'Quote Status' is changed to 'Sent to Zuora' and 'Billing Request Type' = null and 'Processing Status' = null -> 'Billing - Processing Status outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_BP_Billing_Processing_Status
decisions.label: *Rule (BP)* - Billing - Processing Status

decisions.description: Contact Product is changed and Quote Business type = Feature Update and Contact Product = True MQ-1425
decisions.name: Rule_CU_Contact_Product_is_changed
decisions.label: *Rule - (CU)* - Contact Product is changed

decisions.description: 'Exception product' = true, only when the field is changed
decisions.name: Rule_EPT_Exception_product_true
decisions.label: *Rule(EPT)* - 'Exception product' = true

rules.name: Exception_product_true_and_QTB_Feature_Update
rules.label: 'Exception product' = true and QTB <> Feature Update

rules.name: Exception_product_is_true_and_QTB_is_Feature_Update
rules.label: 'Exception product' is true and QTB is Feature Update

rules.name: Is_new_or_Currency_is_changed
rules.label: Is new or Currency is changed

decisions.description: When Product Type is changed to one of the following values: Research AI, Digital Suite, Grow MI, Sales Intelligence, Intelligence Suite -> 'Update SI Guided' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_GF_Guided_flow_enhancements_s
decisions.label: *Rule - (GF)* - Guided flow enhancements s

decisions.description: MIS-4431 - Migrate WF to Flow
decisions.name: Rule_ITA_Internal_Test_Account
decisions.label: *Rule (ITA)* - Internal Test Account

decisions.description: Contract with credit card payment need to sent to Billing upon Ready for Billing status Amendment - Contract with credit card payment need to sent to Billing
decisions.name: Rule_QC_Quotes_CC_Amendment_Alert_CC_New_Subscription_Ready_for_Billing
decisions.label: *Rule - (QC)* - Quotes - CC - Amendment Alert & CC - New Subscription - Ready for Billing

rules.name: Update_Billing_Request_Type
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3) OR (1 AND 4 and 5) OR (6 AND 4 AND 7 AND 1)
rules.label: Update Billing Request Type

rules.name: Update_Initial_and_Renewal_Term_Period_Type_Week
rules.label: Update Initial and Renewal Term Period Type - Week

decisions.description: When Trial Quote or Trial Period is changed and Trial Quote = TRUE and Trial Period = 1 month -> 'Update Initial and Renewal Term Period Type' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_TM_Trial_Month_Field_update
decisions.label: *Rule - (TM)* - Trial Month - Field update

rules.name: Update_Initial_and_Renewal_Term_Period_Type
rules.label: Update Initial and Renewal Term Period Type

decisions.description: When the 'Quote Package' is changed to 'Technology Partner' -> 'Update SI Guided' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_TP_TP_Guided_flow_enhancements
decisions.label: *Rule - (TP)* - TP Guided flow enhancements

decisions.description: When the field 'Electronic Payment Method Id' is changed and it's not blank -> 'Update Trial Submit Time Stamp' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_TS_Trial_Submit_was_clicked
decisions.label: *Rule - (TS)* - Trial - Submit was clicked

decisions.description: When 'Trial Quote' and 'Subscription Type' is changed to 'Trial Quote' = TRUE and Subscription Type = 'New Subscription' -> 'Update Trial = Yes' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_TY_Trial_set_to_yes
decisions.label: *Rule - (TY)* - Trial set to yes

decisions.description: MQ-1996 MQ-1936 - If quote.document_format__c == 'Service Order (Terms and Conditions attached) Update Quote.Auto_sign_c to False
decisions.name: Rule_update_watermark_signed
decisions.label: Rule - update watermark signed

decisions.description: MQ-2477 - Show what type of table to show in the contracts
decisions.name: Show_type_of_table
decisions.label: Show type of table

Flow.description: MQ-2708 MQ-2709 MQ-2704 MQ-2507 MQ-2477 MQ-2495 MQ-2433 MQ-2381 MIS-6210 - Quote Status Prior Value MQ-2372 MQ-2360 MQ-2318 MQ-2332 MQ-2320 MQ-2116 MQ-2110 MQ-2066 - No touch update MQ-1987 - update tragat price to 0 MQ-1971 - update migrate to new catalog to true MIS-4431 - Migrate WF to Flow MQ-1626 - Exchange rate MQ-1425 Valid Until on Contact Feature for FU (26 Jun 2022) MIS-1111 - Billing Pushback / Billing Pushback Timestamp MQ-1299 a quote was cancelled but the renewal link is still valid MQ-1445 - Move WFR from Quote object (1 April 2022) MQ-1446 - Move WFR from Quote object (26 April 2022)

formulas.name: for_GuidedSellingText
for_SubsidiaryAddressText
formulas.expression:
CASE( {!$Record.Subsidiary__c}, "Parent Company : SimilarWeb Inc","Similarweb Inc"+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","")+"6 East 32th Street, 8th Floor"+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"New York, NY, 10016"+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"United States"+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Company ID:(EIN) 47-1155768",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : Similarweb FR","SimilarWeb France SAS "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" C/O Mazars France "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" 1 rue des Arquebusiers "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" 67000 Strasbourg "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" France "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Company ID: (VAT #) FR68842296253",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb IL","Similarweb Ltd. "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"33 Derech Yizhak Rabin, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Givatayim, 5348303, Israel "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Company ID: (VAT #) 514244714",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb AU","Similarweb Australia Pty Ltd"+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Suite 2204, 520 Oxford St. "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Bondi Junction, NSW, Australia "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Company ID: (GST ID) 45 639 115 094",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb JP","SimilarWeb Japan K.K. "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Otemachi Building 2F, 1-6-1 Otemachi, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo 100-0004 "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Japan "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Company ID: N/A",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : 42matters AG","42matters AG"+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Rötelstrasse 84, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"8057 Zürich "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Switzerland "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" CHE-224.961.109",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK","Similarweb UK Ltd. "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") + SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" 145 City Rd "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Hoxton " + SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" London "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" EC1V 1AZ "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" United Kingdom "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Company ID: (VAT #) GB174984654",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb DE","Similarweb Germany GmbH "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" c/o Wework, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Neuturmstrasse 5, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Munich, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" BY 80331 "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Germany "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Company ID: (VAT #) DE342790417",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : Admetricks SpA","Admetricks SpA "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Oficina 2401, Providencia, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Av. Nueva Providencia 1881, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Santiago, Region Metropolitana, "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" Chile "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +" RUT: 76.192.113-4",
"Parent Company : Similarweb SGD","Similarweb SG Pte Ltd. "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"135 CECIL STREET, #10-01 "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"Singapore "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"069536 "+ SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") +"GST number: 202200738D",
"Parent company : SimilarWeb Inc : Signal Insights, Inc.", "Signal Insights, Inc." + SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") + "6 E 32nd St, 8th Floor" + SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") + "New York NY 10016" + SUBSTITUTE($Label.Line_Break, "-","") + "United States", null )

formulas.name: fr_ExceptionalContactWordinfForFU
formulas.expression: "As of the Amendment Effective Date, the following provisions are hereby added to the Agreement:"+BR()+" https://www.similarweb.com/corp/legal/supplemental-alternate-terms-conditions"

formulas.name: fr_ExceptionalContractWording
formulas.expression: "As"+ " of"+" the" +" Amendment"+" Effective Date,"+ " the" +" following"+ " provisions" +" are" +" hereby"+ " added"+" to"+ " the"+ " Agreement:"+BR()+"https://www.similarweb.com/corp/legal/supplemental-alternate-terms-conditions"

formulas.name: GF_SIGuidedValue
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Product_Type_Amendment__c},'Research AI'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Product_Type_Amendment__c},'Intelligence Suite'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Product_Type_Amendment__c},'Grow MI'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Product_Type_Amendment__c},'Sales Intelligence'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Product_Type_Amendment__c},'Digital Suite') ), '2', 'ERROR' )

formulas.name: Payment_type_from_billing_account
formulas.expression: CASE({!$Record.Zuora_Parent_Billing_Account__r.Zuora__DefaultPaymentMethod__c}, "ACH", "ACH", "BankTransfer", "Bank Transfer", "Cash", "Cash", "Check", "Check", "CreditCard", "Credit Card", "CreditCardReferenceTransaction", "Credit Card Reference Transaction", "DebitCard", "Debit Card", "Other", "Other", "PayPal", "PayPal", "WireTransfer", "Wire Transfer", "")

formulas.name: payment_type_from_payment_method_object

Flow.label: Quote - Record-Triggered Flow - Before Save

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Billing - Processing Status' to 'Process Successfully' on the Quote
recordUpdates.name: BP_Billing_Processing_Status
recordUpdates.label: BP - Billing - Processing Status

recordUpdates.name: CU_Update_Valid_Until_Today_30_days
recordUpdates.label: CU - Update Valid Until = Today+30 days

recordUpdates.name: EPT_Update_Exceptional_Contract_Wording_for_FU
recordUpdates.label: EPT - Update Exceptional Contract Wording for FU

recordUpdates.description: Update 'SI Guided' field on the Quote with a 'GF_SIGuidedValue' formula
recordUpdates.name: GF_Update_SI_Guided
recordUpdates.label: GF - Update SI Guided

recordUpdates.description: MQ-2066 - update to the quote if the isolation is NT
recordUpdates.name: No_touch_update
recordUpdates.label: No touch update

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Billing Request Type' field on the Quote to 'Ready for Billing'
recordUpdates.name: QA_Update_Billing_Request_Type_Ready_for_Billing
recordUpdates.label: QC - Update Billing Request Type = Ready for Billing

recordUpdates.description: Update fields ‘Initial Term Period Type’ and ‘Renewal Term Period Type’ to be equal 'Week' on the Quote
recordUpdates.name: TF_Update_Initial_Term_Period_Type_and_Renewal_Term_Period_Type
recordUpdates.label: TF - Update Initial Term Period Type and Renewal Term Period Type

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Initial Term Period Type' and 'Renewal Term Period Type' to null
recordUpdates.name: TM_Update_Initial_Term_Period_Type_and_Renewal_Term_Period_Type
recordUpdates.label: TM - Update Initial Term Period Type and Renewal Term Period Type

recordUpdates.description: Update field 'TP Guided Flow' with a formula 'TP_TPGuidedFlowValue' on the Quote
recordUpdates.name: TP_Update_TP_Guided_Flow
recordUpdates.label: TP - Update TP Guided Flow

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Trial Submit Time Stamp' field to NOW value on the Quote
recordUpdates.name: TS_Update_Trial_Submit_Time_Stamp
recordUpdates.label: TS - Update Trial Submit Time Stamp

recordUpdates.description: Update field 'Trial' to 'Yes' on the Quote
recordUpdates.name: TY_Update_Trial
recordUpdates.label: TY - Update Trial

recordUpdates.name: Update_Internal_Test_Account_to_Yes
recordUpdates.label: Update Internal Test Account to Yes

recordUpdates.name: Update_migrate_to_new_catalog
recordUpdates.label: Update migrate to new catalog to true

recordUpdates.name: Update_records_for_multi_subsurbations_information
recordUpdates.label: Update records for multi subsurbations information

recordUpdates.name: Update_table_type_to_one_time
recordUpdates.label: Update table type to one time

recordUpdates.name: Update_the
recordUpdates.label: Update the Certificate ID for Admetricks
